CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Richard Palenchar, Esq. for Petitioner: Joseph Ducote present as guardian ad litem with Jeanne Louise Camus, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise: $15,00.00
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $15,000.00 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor.
Counsel to prepare order.

June 21, 2004- Order rec'd and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Continued To Jun-01-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Appearances:
Fred Girard Meis, Esq. for Plaintiff Joseph M. Ducote
No appearance by Plaintiff, in the hospital as stated by counsel.
This matter is continued to Tuesday, June 1, 2004 at 9:00 AM for plaintiff's attorney to file a declaration i/l of appearance by minor's guardian.
